text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Say, would everyone like to go
on a camping trip together?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A camp trip? Nice, I could get
a lot of relaxing done.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Camping takes a lot of preparation, though.
After all, we would even have to pitch a tent
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh… O-Of course, I didn't think about that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to see a show about camping
on TV. Getting to see the night sky with
everyone seemed so nice…

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it would be too hard
for beginners like us, huh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and of course there's the whole matter
of the campfire to consider. It'd be best to go
with someone more experienced ——

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but you'd be there, King. You're super
first-rate, so it'd probably be no problem for
you to handle.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
With you around, I bet everything would be
smooth sailing. Right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: …R-Right! A matter as simple as camping is no trouble at all for me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: …I need to read up on camping, fast.
